svg.title: ReelGPT Studio Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing data flow from browser UI through API server and pipeline stages to final video output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the browser UI')
sendPrompt('What does the API server do?')
sendPrompt('How does the pipeline orchestrator work?')
sendPrompt('What does the content generator create?')
sendPrompt('How does Sora video generation work?')
sendPrompt('How does Remotion render the video?')
